title: The sociology of intellectual life: the career of the mind in and around the academy
abstract: Click to increase image sizeClick to decrease image size Notes 1. This rather uncannily echoes Julien Benda (2006 Benda, J. 2006. The treason of the intellectuals. New intro. R. Kimball, New Brunswick, NJ: Transaction Publishers. (Orig. pub. 1928.) [Google Scholar] [1928]): ‘Our age is indeed the age of the intellectual organisation of political hatreds. It will be one of its chief claims to notice in the moral history of humanity’ (cited in the Introduction; xi).
journal: British Journal of Sociology of Education
